<MethodEndpoint

  path={"/api/pipeline/json/{fileName}"}
  context={"endpoint"}

Add pipeline data from a JSON file

<Heading
  id={"request"}
  as={"h2"}
  className={"openapi-tabs__heading"}
  children={"Request"}
>
</Heading>

<ParamsDetails
  parameters={[{"description":"The name of the file containing the pipeline data","in":"path","name":"fileName","required":true,"schema":{"type":"string"}}]}
>
